growth_records.medium: Defined nitrogen-minimal medium (Pittman & Bryant based) + ammonium sulfate + 3 mM methionine

up.method: colorimetric (Chaney & Marbach 1962) substrate depletion; ammonium N decreased over growth (Fig 1B1) but no per-biomass rate reported

growth_records.cite: Jong Nam Kim et al. Metabolic networks for nitrogen utilization in Prevotella ruminicola 23. Scientific Reports (2017). DOI:10.1038/s41598-017-08463-3. [PMC5552732]
growth_records.snippet: The bacterium utilized ammonium sulfate supplemented with 3 mM methionine and peptides (tryptone) as nitrogen sources for rapid growth (0.30 h-1 growth rate on ammonium sulfate + Met ...) reaching similar OD values (~1) after 20 h
growth_records.notes: Specific growth rate 0.30 h-1 reported in Table 1 (batch, ammonium+3mM Met). doubling_time = ln2/mu = 0.693/0.30 = 2.31 h. Max OD600 0.95 +/- 0.15 (after 38 h). Ammonium consumption observed (substrate depletion Fig 1B1) but no gDW biomass reported so qS in mmol/gDW/h not derivable. Medium: defined N-minimal, 0.5% glucose C source, 0.05% cysteine HCl reducing agent, 10 mM (NH4)2SO4 (=20 mM NH4+) + 3 mM Met. pH not stated for batch.

growth_records.medium: Defined nitrogen-minimal medium + ammonium sulfate (no methionine)
growth_records.cite: Jong Nam Kim et al. Metabolic networks for nitrogen utilization in Prevotella ruminicola 23. Scientific Reports (2017). DOI:10.1038/s41598-017-08463-3. [PMC5552732]
growth_records.snippet: Growth was not observed (delta OD < 0.01) in the defined medium on ammonium sulfate without Met supplementation (Table 1).
growth_records.notes: No-growth control condition: ammonium (10 mM (NH4)2SO4) without methionine gives specific growth rate 0 h-1, max OD600 < 0.01 (Table 1). Methionine required/stimulatory for growth of strain 23. Doubling time undefined (no growth).

up.method: indirect acid hydrolysis + ninhydrin (Rosen); slight decrease in peptide concentration observed (Fig 1B3), no per-biomass rate reported

growth_records.cite: Jong Nam Kim et al. Metabolic networks for nitrogen utilization in Prevotella ruminicola 23. Scientific Reports (2017). DOI:10.1038/s41598-017-08463-3. [PMC5552732]
growth_records.snippet: 0.24 h-1 on peptides ... Peptides 0.24 (growth rate) 1.31 +/- 0.05 (max OD600)
growth_records.notes: Specific growth rate 0.24 h-1 (Table 1, peptides/tryptone). doubling_time = ln2/0.24 = 2.89 h. Max OD600 1.31 +/- 0.05. Only minor peptide depletion measured (Fig 1B3); no gDW so no mmol/gDW/h uptake rate derivable.

growth_records.medium: Defined nitrogen-minimal medium + 0.1% tryptone + 5 mM ammonium sulfate + 3 mM Met

up.method: colorimetric substrate depletion; ammonium N decreased (Fig 1B2), no per-biomass rate
ninhydrin substrate depletion; amino acid/peptide decreased (Fig 1B2), no per-biomass rate

growth_records.cite: Jong Nam Kim et al. Metabolic networks for nitrogen utilization in Prevotella ruminicola 23. Scientific Reports (2017). DOI:10.1038/s41598-017-08463-3. [PMC5552732]
growth_records.notes: Specific growth rate 0.25 h-1 (Table 1, peptides+ammonium). doubling_time = ln2/0.25 = 2.77 h. Max OD600 1.40 +/- 0.03 (highest of all conditions). Both N sources depleted (Fig 1B2) but no gDW biomass so uptake rates in mmol/gDW/h not derivable.

growth_records.medium: Defined nitrogen-minimal medium + 0.2% casamino acids (amino acids)
growth_records.cite: Jong Nam Kim et al. Metabolic networks for nitrogen utilization in Prevotella ruminicola 23. Scientific Reports (2017). DOI:10.1038/s41598-017-08463-3. [PMC5552732]
growth_records.snippet: Amino acids 0.001 (growth rate) 0.02 +/- 0.0 (max OD600) ... Strain 23 displayed no growth using amino acids as the sole nitrogen source
growth_records.notes: No-growth control: casamino acids as sole N source give specific growth rate 0.001 h-1, max OD600 0.02 +/- 0.0 (Table 1). doubling_time = ln2/0.001 = 693 h (essentially no growth). Amino acid concentration remained stable (not consumed, Fig 1B4).

growth_records.medium: Defined nitrogen-minimal medium, chemostat, excess ammonium (10 mM (NH4)2SO4)

up.units: mM consumed (feed 10 mM minus effluent 3.66 mM, steady state)
up.method: colorimetric (Chaney & Marbach); residual ammonia 3.66 +/- 0.21 mM in effluent

growth_records.cite: Jong Nam Kim et al. Metabolic networks for nitrogen utilization in Prevotella ruminicola 23. Scientific Reports (2017). DOI:10.1038/s41598-017-08463-3. [PMC5552732]
growth_records.snippet: In chemostat culture, higher ammonium concentrations yielded higher ODs (OD600 3.90 +/- 0.28) ... The residual ammonia concentration was 3.66 +/- 0.21 mM in the effluent following growth under excess concentrations of ammonia
growth_records.notes: Chemostat continuous culture at dilution rate D = 0.17 h-1 (Methods); at steady state mu = D = 0.17 h-1, doubling_time = ln2/0.17 = 4.08 h. Excess ammonium feed 10 mM (NH4)2SO4, effluent residual 3.66 mM -> ammonium consumed = 10 - 3.66 = 6.34 mM (expressed as the paper's 10 mM ammonium basis). OD600 = 3.90 +/- 0.28. Per-biomass qNH4 (mmol/gDW/h) not derivable: no gDW-per-OD conversion given. T=38.7 C, pH 6.7, 1 L, 300 rpm.

growth_records.medium: Defined nitrogen-minimal medium, chemostat, limiting ammonium (0.7 mM (NH4)2SO4)

up.units: mM consumed (feed 0.7 mM minus effluent <0.025 mM, steady state)
up.method: colorimetric (Chaney & Marbach); residual ammonium below detection (<0.025 mM)

growth_records.cite: Jong Nam Kim et al. Metabolic networks for nitrogen utilization in Prevotella ruminicola 23. Scientific Reports (2017). DOI:10.1038/s41598-017-08463-3. [PMC5552732]
growth_records.snippet: growth-limiting conditions (OD600 1.19 +/- 0.06) ... residual ammonium was below detectable levels (<0.025 mM) during growth under ammonia limiting conditions
growth_records.notes: Chemostat at D = 0.17 h-1; steady-state mu = D = 0.17 h-1, doubling_time = ln2/0.17 = 4.08 h. Ammonium-limiting feed 0.7 mM (NH4)2SO4, effluent <0.025 mM -> consumed ~= 0.7 - 0.025 = 0.675 mM (fully consumed, N-limited). OD600 = 1.19 +/- 0.06. Per-biomass qNH4 not derivable (no gDW/OD conversion). T=38.7 C, pH 6.7.
